headline: Sherwin-Williams to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 28, 2026
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) will issue a press release announcing its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026, prior to market open on Tuesday, July 28, 2026. At that time, a copy of the press release and information regarding Sherwin-Williams' financial condition, reportable segment results and other information will be available by clicking on this link Sherwin-Williams Press Releases, then clicking on the reference to the July 28 release.
